title: lianthus ellipticifolius
intro: Lianthus ellipticifolius, also known as Chinese or Korean lianthus, is a perennial plant species in the family Gentianaceae, native to China and Korea. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is known to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Lianthus ellipticifolius can be found in tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, gout, and other inflammatory conditions.
